Tip of the day
Skill levels exceeding an activity's main skill requirement gives +1.25% extra Work efficiency for what you're doing, up to 20 levels.

Ironweed twine

Ironweed twine
Type: Material
Value: 8
Fine Value: 48
Keyword: Processed
Properties:
Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

A thick and endurant bundle of twine made from that of its name, ironweed.

The Ironweed twine item is a material.

Uses

Recipe Ingredient

Ironweed twine is an ingredient in the following recipes:

Item Name Service
Requirement 		Skills Materials
Used 		Recipe
Outputs
Craft extra crafty pants Needs Basic Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 31 1x Crafting pants
1x Slipstick
1x Simple wrench
2x Twine or 2x Kelp twine or 2x Ironweed twine		 1x Extra crafty pants
Craft an iron chef's hat Needs Advanced Loom service or better. Tailoring lvl. 61 1x Chef's hat
2x Ironweed twine
2x Tough linen cloth		 1x Iron chef's hat
Craft a violite sickle Needs Advanced Workshop service or better. Crafting lvl. 70 1x Violite bar
1x Mahogany plank
1x Ironweed twine		 1x Violite sickle

Sources

Primary Recipe Output

Craft ironweed twine

You painstakingly break down the ironweed into thin strands which you then weave back together into a strong twine bundle.

Weave the ironweed into a strong twine binding.

Recipe Outputs
Recipe Name Level Service
Requirement 		Materials
Used 		Recipe
Outputs
Craft ironweed twine Crafting lvl. 60 Needs Advanced Workshop service or better. 2x Ironweed 1x Ironweed twine

Recipe Name Base
XP 		Base
Steps 		Base
XP/Step 		Minimum
Steps 		Max
Work Efficiency 		Max
XP/Step 		Full Recipe
W.E.A.R.

Rate 		W.E.A.R.
